ddls:
CREATE TABLE "storage_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of storage device (e.g., hard drive, solid state drive) */,
  "block_size" TEXT /* Block size of the storage device (e.g., 4k, 8k) */,
  "device_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage device model */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the storage device */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the storage device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_devices_device_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_model_id") REFERENCES storage_device_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarking_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking job */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage device the job was executed on */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Read/write pattern of the job (e.g., read, write) */,
  "io_depth" INTEGER /* I/O depth of the job */,
  "num_jobs" INTEGER /* Number of jobs executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the job */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_jobs_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES job_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarking_jobs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES storage_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking job the metric belongs to */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the job (Mb/s) */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the job (ms) */,
  "iops" INTEGER /* IOPS of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_execution_history" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job execution */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being executed */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage device the job was executed on */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the job execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the job execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job execution (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_execution_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_execution_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES storage_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the job template */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Read/write pattern of the template */,
  "io_depth" INTEGER /* I/O depth of the template */,
  "num_jobs" INTEGER /* Number of jobs in the template */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the template (e.g., read, write, mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_device_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage device model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage device model */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of storage device (e.g., hard drive, solid state drive) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the storage device model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the storage device model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarking_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmarking suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the benchmarking suite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suite_job_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suite-job mapping */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking suite */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suite_job_mappings_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_suites ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suite_job_mappings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job result */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking job */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the job (Mb/s) */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the job (ms) */,
  "iops" INTEGER /* IOPS of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_results_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-job history entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage device */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking job */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the job was executed on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_job_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES storage_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_job_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking job */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message in the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_tag_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job-tag mapping */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking job */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_tag_mappings_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES job_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_tag_mappings_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES benchmarking_jobs ("job_id")
)
